command.theme: What broke during the offline-mode rewrite, and the fix
command.notes: An honest behind-the-scenes: the offline solver first shipped with a caching bug that returned stale windows; the post names the bug, the fix, and the lesson. Candid, not self-flagellating; no hype, no spin.

exercises: on-voice: candid builder register, owns a mistake without spin
fact-safety: the bug and fix are described as a (synthetic) verified event, not embellished
reviewer_note: Behind-the-scenes posts test whether the brand can be honest in its own voice. On-voice = candid and specific; off-voice = either glossed PR or performative self-criticism.
